mission.title: dapr: PubSub's DeadLetter Topic
mission.description: PubSub's DeadLetter Topic. Requested by 21+ users.

steps.title: Check current dapr deployment
steps.description:
Verify your dapr version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr
helm list -n dapr 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working dapr installation.

steps.title: Review dapr configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant dapr configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr
kubectl get configmap -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dapr
```
After a message cannot be delivered to a subscriber (retry time out or message expiration), the message should be sent to a special topic. The subscriber can subscribe from that topic as well, or simply leave messages there to be manually verified.

steps.title: Apply the fix for PubSub's DeadLetter Topic
Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr
kubectl get events -n dapr --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "PubSub's DeadLetter Topic" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: This is a good description of the feature. Do you think this might be important enough to be a P1?

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with dapr installed or the issue environment reproducible.
